privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated media files populated via setup scripts. There are 6 input files generated using ffmpeg testsrc2 and sine audio streams. Of these, 4 files are already conforming to the requirements, while 2 ('03_block_A.mov' and '06_cooldown.mkv') are non-conforming and require normalization. The total expected duration of the concatenated master video and the extracted MP3 audio is exactly 36 seconds. The target specification requires 1280x720 resolution, 30 fps, H.264 video codec, and AAC audio codec at 44100 Hz.
